files.patch: @@ -5891,3 +5891,3 @@ - When preview features are enabled, the frame's method is an object - constructor and the requested local is a "this" value object, the - value_ptr is set to a snapshot of the "this" object. + When preview features are enabled, the frame's method is a value class + constructor and the requested local is a "this" value object, + the value_ptr is set to a snapshot of the object. @@ -5947,3 +5947,3 @@ - When preview features are enabled, the frame's method is an object - constructor and the requested instance is a value object, the - value_ptr is set to a snapshot of the "this" object. + When preview features are enabled, the frame's method is a value class + constructor and the local instance is a value object, + the value_ptr is set to a snapshot of the "this" object.
